SEARCH
Package client.view

Class VisitsReportController

java.lang.Object
client.view.BaseController
client.view.VisitsReportController
public class VisitsReportController extends BaseController
Visits-by-Type report screen, visible to a DEPT_MANAGER only (gated in MainShellController). The manager picks a date range and a park — or "All parks" for the whole region — and clicks Generate to run REPORT_VISITS_BY_TYPE.

The centerpiece is a BarChart: one bar per visitor category ("Individuals" = INDIVIDUAL + FAMILY, "Organized groups" = GROUP) showing the visit count, with a per-category summary tile beneath it carrying the average stay in minutes. Every figure is read straight off the server's VisitsReportDTO — nothing is aggregated client-side.

Extends BaseController for navigation-lifecycle parity; it holds no push subscriptions.

    private static final record 
    VisitsReportController.ParkOption
    Park dropdown entry: carries the id (null for "All parks") but renders the name.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    initialize()
    FXML lifecycle hook: sets default dates, fixes the chart categories, loads parks.
    private void
    loadParks()
    Populates the park dropdown from the server via LIST_PARKS, with an "All parks" option (id null) at the top for a region-wide report.
    private void
    onGenerate()
    Generate-button handler: validates inputs and runs REPORT_VISITS_BY_TYPE.
    private void
    render(VisitsReportDTO report, String parkLabel)
    Paints the chart and summary tiles from the server's report.
    private VBox

    One per-category summary tile: category, visit count, and average stay.

  • Constructor Details

    • VisitsReportController

      public VisitsReportController(NetworkService network, Session session)
      Creates the visits-report controller.
      Parameters:
      network - the shared network service
      session - the current client session

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      private void initialize()
      FXML lifecycle hook: sets default dates, fixes the chart categories, loads parks.

    • loadParks

      private void loadParks()
      Populates the park dropdown from the server via LIST_PARKS, with an "All parks" option (id null) at the top for a region-wide report.

    • onGenerate

      private void onGenerate()
      Generate-button handler: validates inputs and runs REPORT_VISITS_BY_TYPE.

    • render

      private void render(VisitsReportDTO report, String parkLabel)
      Paints the chart and summary tiles from the server's report. Bars carry the visit count per category; the tiles carry the average stay (minutes). Both come straight from the VisitsReportDTO rows.
      Parameters:
      report - the server's report result
      parkLabel - the park label for the chart title

    • summaryTile

      private VBox summaryTile(String category, int visitCount, double avgStayMinutes)
      One per-category summary tile: category, visit count, and average stay.
      Parameters:
      category - the category label
      visitCount - the visit count for the category
      avgStayMinutes - the average stay in minutes
      Returns:
      the summary tile
